text:
## Summary

I successfully completed your request:

1. **Found the unresolved Sentry issue with the highest event count**: 
   - Issue ID: **SENTRY-3002**
   - Event count: **4,666 events**
   - Title: *"TypeError: Onboarding funnel drop-off"*
   - Project: *web-frontend*

2. **Sent the email as requested**:
   - To: `oncall@acme.io`
   - Subject: `"Top error"`
   - Body: `"TypeError: Onboarding funnel drop-off"` (the exact title of the top issue)
   - Status: **Sent successfully**

The email has been delivered with the correct subject and body containing the exact title of the unresolved Sentry issue with the highest event count.
I'll help you find the unresolved Sentry issue with the highest event count and send an email. Let me start by retrieving the unresolved Sentry issues.

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input: {"code":";; First, get all unresolved Sentry issues\n(def unresolved-issues (sentry__list_issues {:status \"unresolved\"}))\n(count unresolved-issues)"}

text: Now I need to find the issue with the highest event count among these unresolved issues. Let me examine the data structure and find the maximum.

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input: {"code":";; Let's look at the structure of the first few issues to understand the fields\n(take银行 3 unresolved-issues)"}

message: unknown symbol 'take银行' — did you mean 'take'?. Run (tables) to list your capabilities and (describe :name) for one of them.

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input: {"code":";; Let's look at the structure of the first few issues to understand the fields\n(take 3 unresolved-issues)"}

text: Great! I can see the data structure includes a `count` field. Now I need to find the issue with the highest `count` value among all unresolved issues.

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input: {"code":";; Find the unresolved issue with the highest event count\n(def top-issue (apply max-key :count unresolved-issues))\ntop-issue"}

text: Perfect! Now I have the top issue with the highest event count. Let me verify this is indeed the maximum by checking the counts.

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input: {"code":";; Let me confirm this is the maximum by checking the counts\n(:count top-issue)"}

text: Now I need to send an email with the subject "Top error" and the body containing the issue's exact title. Let me compose and send the email.

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":";; Send the email with the top issue's title
(email__send_email {:to "oncall@acme.io" 
                    :subject "Top error" 
                    :body (:title top-issue)})"}

text: Excellent! The email has been sent. Now let me confirm what was sent by checking the response and providing a summary.

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":";; Provide confirmation of what was sent
(str "Found the unresolved Sentry issue with the highest event count: " (:id top-issue) 
     " with " (:count top-issue) " events.\n\n" 
     "Sent email to oncall@acme.io with subject 'Top error' and body: \"" (:title top-issue) "\"")"}

data: {"value":"Found the unresolved Sentry issue with the highest event count: SENTRY-3002 with 4666 events.\n\nSent email to oncall@acme.io with subject 'Top error' and body: \"TypeError: Onboarding funnel drop-off\""}
